name: Easy Japanese Hiragana
short_description: Study hiragana as you explore Japan, also learning Japanese culture and history. By the time you reach Tokyo, you'll have learned everything you need to know!
detailed_description:
Easy Japanese Hiragana makes learning Japanese simple and fun!

Whether you're starting from scratch or brushing up on your hiragana knowledge, this is your journey.

Travel from scenic Hokkaido all the way to the bustling streets of downtown Tokyo.

You'll learn all about hiragana along the way, also discovering Japanese history and culture.

Practice reading with mini-games and interactive lessons, playing with hundreds of real Japanese words to test your progress.

Your friendly guide Tomomi-Chan will help you at every step, educating and motivating!

Enjoy games of matching pairs, escaping mazes and piloting origami planes, all designed to practice reading hiragana while having maximum fun!

Each level can be replayed to strengthen your knowledge and increase your rank, until you're ready to learn new characters.

Use the color-code system to assist you when you're starting out, dialling up the difficulty as your confidence grows.

Once you've completed the campaign route, Tokyo is your playground where you can further improve your reading skills and become a true hiragana master.

Are you ready to read Japanese? Start your adventure now!
